    senkouB = ((df.high.rolling(52).max() + df.low.rolling(52).min()) / 2).shift(26)

strategy_name = "StochRSI_ADX_VIX_State_Trans_Adaptive"

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

def compute_stoch_rsi(close, rsi_period=14, stoch_period=14):
    delta = close.diff()
    gain = np.where(delta > 0, delta, 0)
    loss = np.where(delta < 0, -delta, 0)
    avg_gain = pd.Series(gain).rolling(rsi_period).mean()
    avg_loss = pd.Series(loss).rolling(rsi_period).mean()
    rs = avg_gain / (avg_loss + 1e-9)
    rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))
    min_rsi = rsi.rolling(stoch_period).min()

    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data.copy()
        self._init_custom_indicators()
        self.signal = self._generate_signal()

    def _init_custom_indicators(self):
        # Custom indicator calculations

    def _calc_cmo(self, close, period=14):
        up = close.diff().clip(lower=0)
        down = -close.diff().clip(upper=0)
        sum_up = up.rolling(period).sum()
        sum_down = down.rolling(period).sum()
        cmo = 100 * (sum_up - sum_down) / (sum_up + sum_down)
        return cmo

    def _calc_cmo(self, close, period=14):
        diff = close.diff()

        down = -diff.where(diff < 0, 0).rolling(period).sum()

class Strategy_TQQQ_KCAroon(StandaloneStrategy):
    def _calc_kama(self, price, period=10):
        """Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average"""
        change = (price - price.shift(period)).abs()
        volatility = (price - price.shift(1)).abs().rolling(period).sum()
        er = change / volatility.replace(0, 1e-5)
        sc = (er * 0.666 + 0.064)**2
        kama = price.copy()
